app.title: Before You Send — Interactive demo
app.name: Before You Send
app.tagline: Understand what they really meant. Check how your message sounds before you send it.
lang.label: Language
onb1.title: Understand what they meant
onb1.p: Upload what you received and get a quick read, the key signals and three replies you can use.
onb2.title: Check how it sounds
onb2.h2: Check the tone before you send.
onb2.p: See a score, the key issue and four better rewrites: clearer, warmer, firmer or shorter.
onb3.title: Built for your phone
onb3.notice: This demo uses real AI from the local server on your computer. The key stays server-side and never reaches the browser.
onb3.h2: Open it on your phone like a real app.
onb3.p: Open it on the same Wi‑Fi and then add it to your home screen.
home.install.title: Install on your phone
home.install.p: Add it to your home screen to test it like a real app.
home.hero.h2: Understand what they really meant. Check how your message sounds before you send it.
home.hero.p: Try texts, voice notes and screenshots directly from your phone. It answers in a few seconds.
home.health.ok.detail: You can test texts, voice notes and screenshots.
home.health.bad.detail: Finish the AI setup to use the analysis.
home.health.off.detail: I cannot connect right now. Check the server and try again.
home.card.decode.title: Understand what they meant
home.card.send.title: Check how it sounds
home.card.send.p: Score the tone before you send
home.fast.title: Fastest way to try it
home.fast.p: 1. Test a received message. 2. Check a message you want to send. 3. Download the share card from your phone.
decode.title: Understand what they meant
decode.text.help: Paste a message or a voice note transcript.
decode.text.placeholder: Paste a message or a voice note transcript here
decode.voice.help: Upload an audio file or paste a transcript directly.
decode.voice.placeholder: If you want, paste the voice note transcript here.
decode.image.help: Upload a chat screenshot. Or paste the extracted text.
decode.image.placeholder: If you prefer, paste the text extracted from the screenshot.
send.title: Check how it sounds
send.placeholder: Paste the message you are about to send here
history.title: History
history.empty: No saved analyses yet. Try a read or check a message.
settings.title: Settings
settings.blur.title: Blur names
settings.blur.p: The share card keeps names blurred.
settings.onboarding.title: Replay onboarding
settings.reset.title: Full reset
settings.about.title: How it works
settings.about.p: Use it from your phone like a mini app. The analysis comes back in a few seconds.
settings.about.p2: If something breaks, check the connection status from Home.
results.loading.voice: Transcribing and analyzing the voice note…
share.decode: Understand what they meant. Check how it sounds.
